name: ByteRover
description: ByteRover context engine (mono) — recalls curated knowledge from the centralized brv data dir (<brv-data>/projects/<flat>/context-tree/) into the assemble system prompt; agent invokes `record.mjs` via its shell/code-exec tool to save new knowledge.

cwd.description: Working directory for byterover-mono commands. Resolved against the project that has been `brv init`-ed (its tree lives at <brv-data>/projects/<flat-cwd>/context-tree/).

recallScript.description: Path to mono's bundled scripts (its parent dir is used for the record.mjs path in the curate guidance; recall is in-process). Defaults to the installed skill dir — ~/.agents/skills/byterover/scripts (legacy: ~/.openclaw/skills/byterover/scripts). Overridable via the OPENCLAW_BYTEROVER_RECALL_SCRIPT env var.

recallTimeoutMs.description: Hard deadline for the recall subprocess. Defaults to 10000. Capped at 10000 to stay within OpenClaw's agent-ready timeout.

recallLimit.description: Top-N cap on hits returned by recall. Defaults to 5.

queryTimeoutMs.description: Legacy alias for recallTimeoutMs (cli-flavor compat). Use recallTimeoutMs in new configs.
